arts.ttl: Andy Halliday says Celtic will win the league by 'record points'
arts.sum: Last season, Celtic won the title by eight points and they weren’t even at their best, including by 30 points during the 2016/17 season, but Aberdeen finished second then and Rangers were 39 points behind. Andy Halliday says Celtic will win Premiership title by ‘record points’ margin

arts.ttl: “This is the least difficult” – Celtic seen as easiest match by Club Brugge player
arts.sum: Celtic face Club Brugge this evening in the Champions League, with Brendan Rodgers’ side sat 18th in the table and their opponents a little lower down in 23rd. Club Brugge have won two and lost two of their matches so far in this UEFA campaign, and they see the match against Celtic as a chance The post “This is the least difficult” – Celtic seen as easiest match by Club Brugge player appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers hails Celtic mentality after Dortmund as he aims for three points vs Club Brugge
arts.sum: Celtic go into battle against Club Brugge tonight and Brendan Rodgers’ men could make a statement by claiming three points on home soil. Brendan Rodgers knows no complacency can be present during his side’s league phase run-in, especially against an outfit like Club Brugge, who are sucker punch specialists.

arts.ttl: 'We can make noise here too' – defiant Club Brugge supporters on Celtic Park roar
arts.sum: Club Brugge supporters will take up 3,000 seats at Celtic Park in what is set to be a lively Champions League encounter

arts.ttl: 'Oh, he's massive'... John Hartson points out Hoops hero who makes Celtic 'a different side'
arts.sum: Celtic are getting set to play their biggest game of the season so far as Club Brugge comes visiting in the Champions League. Why John Hartson says Cameron Carter-Vickers makes Celtic ‘look a lot stronger’

arts.ttl: Joe Gelhardt 'wanted' by Rangers as Celtic loan transfer scuppered by red tape
arts.sum: Gers boss Philippe Clement wants to bolster his attacking options after watching his goal-shy side score just 17 times from 12 league games this season. Join Football Scotland's Rangers WhatsApp community!

arts.ttl: Listen - Celtic v Club Brugge preview
arts.sum: Liam McLeod, Tom English and Scott Coyne preview Celtic v Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Three Club Brugge players Brendan Rodgers must shackle in Champions League Celtic Park clash
arts.sum: Tzolis has scored 75 career goals and created 25 in 189 appearances and will be looking to add to that tonight at Celtic Park . However, there are three Brugge players who are on fire this season that Brendan Rodgers must keep an eye on at Celtic Park as 67 Hail Hial profiles the Belgian side’s goal threat.

arts.ttl: Gordon Dalziel hails the 'absolutely brilliant' Celtic man who Brendan Rodgers should start every week
arts.sum: Later, he added: “If Celtic play in their biggest game, that will probably start tomorrow night (vs Club Brugge) to get these three points that would put them in an unbelievable position, and he (Rodgers) plays his strongest team, Hatate is starting in that strongest team. On that note, Gordon Dalziel has pointed to the Bhoys figure he believes would always make their strongest side despite the unwarranted criticism he has received in the past from some quarters.

arts.ttl: Peter Grant says Celtic star can't get 'any minutes' under Brendan Rodgers despite doing 'nothing wrong'
arts.sum: “You have got your centre-forwards performing, Adam Idah coming on and scoring,” said Grant. Peter Grant says Luke McCowan has done ‘nothing wrong’ at Celtic
